name: phenotype-mcp-asset
absorption_pr: KooshaPari/phenotype-mcp-asset#1 (McpKit extraction PR B — substrate carve-out)
redirect: fastmcp-asset inside PhenoFastMCP-rust; temporary standalone repo deleted after fold
rationale: McpKit was a multi-substrate mega-repo (Python+TS+Rust pack handlers, asset library, agent servers). The Rust asset carve-out first landed as KooshaPari/phenotype-mcp-asset, then was folded into PhenoFastMCP-rust as crates/fastmcp-asset so Rust MCP framework assets live with the Rust FastMCP target instead of another generic standalone substrate repo. The Python carve-out is agentmcp-hex (row #54) and the agent-runner substrate is in KooshaPari/Agentora (row #53).
role_in_fleet: Rust FastMCP workspace crate - reusable capability for MCP pack/asset handling. Consumed by PhenoFastMCP-rust and downstream MCP server implementations.
test_status: folded source and provenance into PhenoFastMCP-rust/crates/fastmcp-asset; standalone repo superseded
